## reference · Hicks Law

* Decision time increases with the number and complexity of choices.
* Minimize choices when response times are critical to decrease decision time.
* Break complex tasks into smaller steps to decrease cognitive load.
* Avoid overwhelming users by highlighting recommended options.
* Use progressive onboarding to minimize cognitive load for new users.
* Be cautious not to simplify to the point of abstraction.

Sources: https://lawsofux.com/hicks-law/
